meta_title: InterTrade CRM | Professional Portable B2B CRM
hero_title:
Professional B2B CRM.
Built for your success.
hero_desc_1: InterTrade CRM is the ultimate portable solution for small and medium-sized businesses, as well as independent entrepreneurs. It provides a comprehensive, easy-to-use platform for tracking client communications, managing your sales pipeline, and ensuring that no lead is ever lost.
hero_desc_2: Designed to work completely offline, this tool empowers you to control your business data without the need for constant internet access or expensive subscriptions. With an intuitive dashboard and built-in reporting, you can effortlessly monitor deal stages, SLA progress, and performance metrics, keeping your business organized and efficient.
banner_title: Your business data in your hands.
features_subtitle: Everything you need to handle corporate clients without SaaS overhead dependencies.
f1_desc: Distributed as a single executable file. Drop it into any directory, launch instantly, and start working without system clutter.
f2_desc: All data stays localized on your machine inside an encrypted database. Absolute defense against remote breaches and data harvesting.
f3_desc: Built-in permission control architecture supporting distinct levels: Administrator, Supervisor, and operational Users.
f4_desc: Bulk load your legacy client rosters easily via unified Excel or CSV pipelines and export analytical reports effortlessly.
f5_desc: Color-coded metric matrix dashboard flags new leads, active negotiations, and overdue touchpoints automatically.
f6_desc: Enforces required fields during transition stages to guarantee no critical phone numbers or email records are missing.
showcase_subtitle: Clean corporate layout engineered strictly for rapid execution and high focus.
dl_subtitle: Production Release v1.0.0 • No configuration overhead
start_desc: Run the executable file, define your core database parameters, and deploy instantly.
support_subtitle: Help keep this independent operational software alive, modern, and free for businesses everywhere.
support_statement: "This CRM is 100% free, offline, and secure. I develop it in my free time to help small businesses save money. If it helps your business grow, consider supporting the project. Buy developer a coffee to keep it alive."
feedback_pre: Encountered an operational bug or missing a key feature?
license_statement: Free for use. Modification and commercial distribution of source structures is strictly prohibited under terms.
